user.title: LESCO CCMS bill
user.description: Enter your consumer reference number (at least 14 digits; trailing letter e.g. U is optional). Data is read from the public CCMS bill API only.

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach CCMS or unexpected HTTP error.
error.invalid_reference: Reference not found or invalid — check digits and try again.
error.unknown: Unexpected error while loading the bill.
